simulationRequirement: Stress-test how a 7% reimbursement cut affects MetroCare's hospital and clinic network over 30, 90, and 180 days, including throughput, care access, covenant pressure, and investor sentiment.

organization.name: MetroCare Health System
organization.careSetting: Regional hospital and outpatient clinic network

assumptions: Medicare reimbursement declines by 7% starting next quarter.
Commercial payers partially follow with tighter utilization review.
Labor costs remain elevated and vacancy rates do not materially improve in the first 90 days.
Existing debt covenants tighten lender tolerance if EBITDA weakens further.
